results.rendered_html:
utkṣepaka a. One who throws or tosses up, who or what elevates or raises;  Y. 2. 274. 
— kaḥ
1 A stealer of clothes &c.; vastrādyutkṣipatyapaharatītyutkṣepakaḥ  Mit. 
2 One who sends or orders.
